creator: sten@blinkenlights.nl
text:
On Sat, 4 May 2013, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of dns/powerdns-recursor,
>
> Please note that PR ports/178340 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/178340

Ack, please apply.

-- 
Sten Spans

"There is a crack in everything, that's how the light gets in."
Leonard Cohen - Anthem
